meaning: adj.大马士革的 大马士革人的 n.大马士革人vt. 用波形花纹装饰
examples: This truly is a Damascene conversion.
Entrees, such as eggplant fatte, are typically Damascene.
In yet another embodiment, metal layer (16) is a damascene copper layer.
Could it be that Mr Castro had a Damascene conversion when he recently met the pope in Rome?
Would this be a journey of personal discovery - or even something Damascene - was the question asked throughout.
